next_steps: Serologic evaluation including ANA, anti-dsDNA, complement levels (C3, C4), and anti-PLA2R antibodies
Serum and urine protein electrophoresis with immunofixation
Initiation of ACE inhibitor or ARB for antiproteinuric effect and blood pressure control
Initiation of anticoagulation prophylaxis based on high risk of thrombosis in severe nephrotic syndrome
Management of lipid profile with statin therapy
Evaluation of thyroid function with free T4 and anti-TPO antibodies to assess for Hashimoto's thyroiditis
